Term Sheet: Series B Funding

Date: 15 October 2023

Company: Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T202312345Z)

Investors: Future Ventures LLP

Contact: Mr. John Tan, +65 9123 4567, john.tan@futureventures.sg

Funding Amount: SGD 5,000,000

Lead Investor: Dr. Emily Wong, NRIC: S8765432F

Valuation: Post-money valuation of SGD 20,000,000

Use of Proceeds: Expansion of R&D and marketing efforts.

Investor Rights: Preferred shares with anti-dilution protection; Right of First Refusal (ROFR).

Conditions Precedent: Completion of due diligence satisfactory to the Investors.

Obfuscated URL: https://quantum.sg/user/S1234567A

The SPA shall include customary representations and warranties. This term sheet is not binding, and the project plan does not involve any change to the current project status.
